input.title: Drag-and-drop dead zone between thoughts
input.body:
## Steps to Reproduce

Drag a thought slowly across a context with several thoughts. 

## Current Behavior

When dragging directly over a thought, there is a small zone where the drop-hover disappears.  

https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/750276/212223261-20884f28-07cc-4184-abf6-693ad4ceb678.MOV

## Expected Behavior

There should be no gaps between the drop zones.

Test across large and small font sizes.
